notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist.
final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: rarity badge icon set for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate rarity badge sheet for item/commonness states.
Subject: three compact fantasy badges in a horizontal sheet: common bronze/stone badge, uncommon silver/blue badge, rare gold/purple jewel badge. Each uses simple shape language and clear value hierarchy.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game UI icons, crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: three equal badges centered in cells, transparent-background cutout feel, no labels.
Lighting/mood: collectible but restrained.
Color palette: bronze, silver-blue, gold-purple, dark backing.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no casino imagery, no gore, avoid tiny detail.
